summary.summary: Update OmnipodKit submodule to a new commit (adf210d20) and merge upstream dev into the branch; add translated strings and Issue templates (see pr:nightscout/Trio#1160; pr:gordolio/Trio#1160; commit:c34a1c6925dbe7706d28624307b96c2b8b3349f6; diff:ff4f3c44a8bc; commit:348ffff7f211993b8af766bd4a9f1f5c37493786; commit:8b2a6ae5717291ab9515c89b0ba994d21fa1a6bc; file:9ef8daf73cd9).
summary.userFacingImpact: This change updates the OmnipodKit submodule and adds translations plus repository Issue templates (pr:nightscout/Trio#1160; commit:c34a1c6925dbe7706d28624307b96c2b8b3349f6). The diff shows only the submodule commit pointer change (diff:ff4f3c44a8bc; file:9ef8daf73cd9), so there is no direct evidence in these supplied sources of changes to app-level code or runtime behavior within this repository. Because translations could be user-visible within the OmnipodKit component but this patch only updates the submodule reference here, a human review is recommended to determine any concrete runtime or UI impact (pr:gordolio/Trio#1160; diff:ff4f3c44a8bc).
